source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The partially completed circuit of a non-inverting amplifier, incorporating an ideal op-amp, is shown in Fig. 7.1. For the completed circuit of Fig. 7.1, the gain of the amplifier is 25 . The resistance of resistor $R_1$ is $12 \mathrm{k}\Omega$. Calculate the resistance of resistor $R_2$.
